---
title: "Computational Complexity Comparison via Scaling Limits for Emerging MCMC Samplers"
author:
  - name: "Hirofumi Shiba"
    affiliations: 
      - name: "ISM (3rd year PhD Student)"
date: "2/10/2026"
categories: [Slide, PDMP]
image: ../../../assets/upcoming.png
format:
  # html: default
  revealjs: 
    output-file: ISI-ISM-ISSAS_Slides.html
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: 
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
    logo: ../../../assets/profile.jpg
    css: ../../../assets/slides.css
    footer: |
      [ISI-ISM-ISSAS Joint Conference](ISI-ISM-ISSAS.qmd)
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    controls: true
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    self-contained-math: true
    shift-heading-level-by: -1
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: 目次
    number-sections: true
    theme: serif
    show-slide-number: all
    include-in-header: ../../../assets/forSlides.html
    tbl-cap-location: bottom
    margin: 0.05
    comment: false
    template-partials:
      - ../../../assets/toc-slide.html
    include-after-body: ../../../assets/toc-add.html
bibliography: 
    - ../../../assets/2023.bib
    - ../../../assets/2024.bib
    - ../../../assets/2025.bib
csl: ../../../assets/apalike.csl
comment: false
code-fold: false
execute:
    cache: true
html-math-method: katex
abstract-title: 概要
abstract: |
  ISI-ISM-ISSAS Joint Conference, 2026.
  Slides are [[here]{.underline}](ISI-ISM-ISSAS_Slides.html). Preprint is [[here]{.underline}](../../2026/Posters/ISI-ISM-ISSAS/ISI-ISM-ISSAS.pdf)．
slide:
  event-title: ISI-ISM-ISSAS Joint Conference
  place: Academia Sinica, Taiwan (2nd Conference Room, 3F)
  time: 9:50-9:55
  event-url: https://www3.stat.sinica.edu.tw/3ijc2026/
  pdf: ../posts/2026/Posters/ISI-ISM-ISSAS/description.pdf
---

## What is a [PDMP]{.color-unite}?

![An illustration of a [Piecewise Deterministic Markov Process]{.color-unite}. Output from the `PDMPFlux.jl` package.](../../2024/Slides/PDMPs/ZigZag_SlantedGauss2D_横長.gif)

{{< include ../../../assets/_preamble.qmd >}}

### Three Categories of Monte Carlo

:::: {.columns style="text-align: center;"}
::: {.column width="33%"}
![[Markov Chain<br>(1953--)]{.large-letter}](../../2024/Slides/PDMPs/RWMH.gif)
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![[Diffusion<br>(1978--)]{.large-letter .color-blue}](../../2024/Slides/PDMPs/Langevin.gif)
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![[PDMP<br>(2008--)]{.large-letter .color-unite}](../../2024/Slides/PDMPs/ZigZag_SlantedGauss2D_longer.gif)
:::
::::

### [PDMP]{.color-unite} ≒ ODE + Jump

![](ISI-ISM-ISSAS/Equations.png)

### Which One is Faster ?

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
![[Bouncy Particle Sampler]{.large-letter}<br>[@Bouchard-Cote+2018]](../../2024/Slides/PDMPs/BPS_SlantedGauss2D.gif){width="70%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![[Forward Event-Chain Monte Carlo]{.large-letter}<br>[@Michel+2020]](../../2024/Slides/PDMPs/ForwardECMC_StandardGauss2D.gif){width="70%"}
:::

::::
